success_criteria: Why they bought: replaced a spreadsheet-based dispatch process ahead of a fleet expansion. Legacy system: NotionHarbor Spreadsheets. Stakeholder: Dana Ruiz, Fleet Manager, champion. Success criteria: consolidate dispatch logging into one system of record within 90 days.
